Title: Minimalist Skyline Sunrise Sticker - Urban Art Decor
Description:
Capture the vibrant energy of the city with this stylish and modern skyline sticker. Designed in a striking retro synthwave style, this sticker features a sun rising over a dense cityscape, combining warm oranges and vivid turquoise accents.

The minimalist aesthetic makes it a versatile piece of art, perfect for adding a bold, urban flair to various surfaces. Whether you are decorating a laptop, water bottle, sketchbook, or wall, this sticker brings a touch of neon-lit city atmosphere to your space.

  • Style: Synthwave, Retro, Modern, Geometric
  • Perfect For: Laptop decoration, notebook personalization, gift wrapping, or art projects.
  • Vibe: Energetic, Nostalgic, Urban, Cinematic

It is an easy-to-apply vinyl sticker that maintains its vibrant colors and rich details, making it a durable and eye-catching addition to any collection.
